---
title: "Publications"
---

## Journal and Conference Papers

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Interpolation-based coordinate descent method for parameterized quantum circuits</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Jiang Hu, Taehee Ko, Jiayuan Wu, Dong An.</div>
<div class="meta"><em>Communications Physics</em> <strong>9</strong>, 41, 2026.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s42005-025-02473-8">Journal</a><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.04620">arXiv:2503.04620</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Extended parameter-shift rules with minimal derivative variance for parameterized quantum circuits</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Jiang Hu, Dong An, Zaiwen Wen.</div>
<div class="meta"><em>Physical Review Applied</em> <strong>25</strong>(1), 014005, 2026.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://journals.aps.org/prapplied/abstract/10.1103/f57b-q28w">Journal</a><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.08802">arXiv:2508.08802</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Hyperbolic contrastive learning for cross-domain recommendation</div>
<div>Xin Yang, Heng Chang, **Zhijian Lai**, Jinze Yang, Xingrun Li, Yu Lu, Shuaiqiang Wang, Dawei Yin, Erxue Min.</div>
<div class="meta">CIKM '24: Proceedings of the 33rd ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management, 2024.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://dl.acm.org/doi/abs/10.1145/3627673.3679572">DOI</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Riemannian interior point methods for constrained optimization on manifolds</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Akiko Yoshise.</div>
<div class="meta"><em>Journal of Optimization Theory and Applications</em> <strong>201</strong>(1), 433--469, 2024.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10957-024-02403-8">Journal</a><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.09762">arXiv:2203.09762</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Completely positive factorization by a Riemannian smoothing method</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Akiko Yoshise.</div>
<div class="meta"><em>Computational Optimization and Applications</em> <strong>83</strong>(3), 933--966, 2022.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10589-022-00417-4">Journal</a><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.01538">arXiv:2107.01538</a></div>
:::

## Preprints

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Pauli-structured preconditioning for quantum linear system solvers</div>
<div>Hantao Nie, **Zhijian Lai**, Dong An.</div>
<div class="meta">Preprint, 2026.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01733">arXiv:2606.01733</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Achieving double-logarithmic precision dependence in optimization-based quantum unstructured search</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Dong An, Jiang Hu, Zaiwen Wen.</div>
<div class="meta">Preprint, 2026.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26039">arXiv:2603.26039</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Quantum circuit design from a retraction-based Riemannian optimization framework</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Hantao Nie, Jiayuan Wu, Dong An.</div>
<div class="meta">Preprint, 2026.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.20605">arXiv:2602.20605</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Advancing Mathematical Research via Human-AI Interactive Theorem Proving</div>
<div>Chenyi Li, **Zhijian Lai**, Dong An, Jiang Hu, Zaiwen Wen.</div>
<div class="meta">Preprint, 2025.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.09443">arXiv:2512.09443</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">A Grover-compatible manifold optimization algorithm for quantum search</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**, Dong An, Jiang Hu, Zaiwen Wen.</div>
<div class="meta">Preprint, 2025.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.08432">arXiv:2512.08432</a></div>
:::

## Thesis

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">Riemannian Optimization Algorithms for Applications and Their Theoretical Properties</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**.</div>
<div class="meta">PhD thesis, 2024.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="files/doc/phd_thesis_2024.pdf">PDF</a></div>
:::

::: {.pub-item}
<div class="pub-title">A New Method for Completely Positive Matrix Factorization</div>
<div>**Zhijian Lai**.</div>
<div class="meta">Master thesis, 2021.</div>
<div class="link-row"><a class="pill-link" href="files/doc/master_thesis_2021.pdf">PDF</a></div>
:::
